name: test.kemu.io.file-system
description: Allows access to the file system to scan, read and write files and directories

scripts.start-server: npm run copyFiles && npm run copyFolders && webpack serve
scripts.build:processor: tsc -p tsconfig-processor.json && npm run copyFiles && npm run copyFolders
scripts.build: rimraf dist/ && webpack --mode production && npm run build:processor
